title: Stanford CRFM disabled Alpaca public demo citing hosting costs and inadequate content filters
primary_source_id: Stanford CRFM | Alpaca release page, 13 Mar 2023
mitigation_or_response: Stanford CRFM stated on the Alpaca release page that the public demo was disabled because the research-access goal was mostly achieved and, given hosting costs and inadequacies of content filters, the team brought down the demo.
paper_use_note: Official self-description only; do not claim legal breach, measured user harm, prevalence, unsafe deployment, or that content filters failed in a realized incident.

title: Sakana says an AI Scientist-v2 paper passed an ICLR workshop peer-review process
primary_source_id: Sakana AI | AI Scientist first publication post, 12 Mar 2025
mitigation_or_response: Sakana AI stated that a paper produced by The AI Scientist-v2 passed peer review at an ICLR 2025 workshop, with stated cooperation from ICLR/workshop organizers and UBC IRB approval.
paper_use_note: Vendor-reported public statement only; do not claim independent validation, paper quality, scientific merit, legality, general acceptance of AI-written papers, or undisclosed reviewer behavior.
